instructions.original_snippets: NEVER load context from done/ without checking dates — stale context from weeks ago misleads current decisions.
NEVER skip verifying the session_id after load — loading the wrong context silently diverges from the user's intent.
Speed: < 3 seconds (default), 5-8 seconds (--full). Use --full only when hot files or thinking artifacts are needed.
After EVERY AskUserQuestion call, check if answers are empty/blank — outside Plan Mode, AskUserQuestion silently returns empty answers.
Contexts in done/ are retired — loading them requires explicit user confirmation.
NEVER treat a loaded context snapshot as a live task list — verify open tasks against current state before acting on them.
